channels.label: Draft PR packet
channels.requirement: No GitHub write required. Produces branch name, PR body, tests, rollback, and reviewer checklist.
channels.description: Reviewer-ready markdown and metadata for a pull request without writing to the source host.

channels.label: GitHub issue
channels.requirement: Requires GitHub PAT or OAuth token with issues write access.
channels.description: Creates a GitHub issue with a normalized remediation or scan handoff body.

channels.label: Slack webhook
channels.requirement: Requires an incoming Slack webhook URL.
channels.description: Posts the report or remediation handoff into a Slack channel using an incoming webhook.

channels.label: Email handoff
channels.requirement: Uses a local mailto draft, or a configured CORS-enabled email relay URL.
channels.description: Generates a browser mail draft or sends through a configured relay endpoint.

channels.label: Jira ticket
channels.requirement: Requires Jira base URL, account email, API token, and project key.
channels.description: Creates a Jira task with a structured remediation or scan summary.

channels.label: Runbook receipt
channels.requirement: No external auth required. Produces copyable steps and evidence.
channels.description: Clipboard-friendly markdown for human execution with stop conditions and rollback.

channels.label: Server runbook
channels.requirement: No automatic server changes. Produces commands for a human-run maintenance window.
channels.description: Operations-focused handoff for patching or validation during a maintenance window.

channels.label: Microsoft Teams workflow webhook
channels.requirement: Requires a Teams Workflows webhook URL. Microsoft 365 connectors are nearing deprecation, so prefer a Workflows-owned webhook.
channels.description: Posts a browser-generated handoff to a Microsoft Teams channel or chat through a Workflows webhook.

channels.label: ServiceNow incident
channels.requirement: Requires a ServiceNow instance URL, table name, and OAuth bearer token with create access to the target table.
channels.description: Creates a ServiceNow incident or task record with a normalized remediation or scan summary.

channels.label: Linear issue
channels.requirement: Requires a Linear personal API key and a target team ID.
channels.description: Creates a Linear issue through the GraphQL API for security engineering or platform backlog handoff.

channels.label: Splunk HEC event
channels.requirement: Requires a Splunk HEC URL and HEC token.
channels.description: Posts the normalized report bundle directly to Splunk HTTP Event Collector for SIEM or analytics use.

channels.label: Elastic Security case
channels.requirement: Requires a Kibana base URL and Elastic API key with Cases write access.
channels.description: Creates an Elastic case with the generated remediation or scan summary.

channels.label: Generic webhook
channels.requirement: Requires a browser-reachable webhook URL and any required headers or bearer token.
channels.description: Posts the full SecurityRecipes delivery envelope to a custom SOAR, queue, or workflow endpoint.
